data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic link generation at booking confirmation. While evidence confirms that a unique Zoom meeting link is generated and included in the confirmation email, there is no evidence provided for the generation of links for Google Meet or Teams, which are also required integrations. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the requirement explicitly states the need for all three integrations.
gaps: No evidence of Google Meet integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
